title: collomia glutinosa
intro: Collomia glutinosa is a flowering plant species, also known as sticky collomia, which belongs to the phlox family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, as well as its ability to soothe and calm the skin. The health benefits of Collomia glutinosa include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and alleviating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Collomia glutinosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health issues.
